_description: Fixture-only proof data for minimal-python-service. State C (minimally populated). Not real project content — for bootstrap self-test validation only.

placeholder_values.REPO_MISSION_STATEMENT: A minimal Python HTTP service fixture for agent-bootstrap self-test proof. Not production code.
